001package guiGradebook;
002
003import java.util.ArrayList;
004import java.util.Collections;
005import java.util.List;
006
007import applicationMain.AccessDeniedException;
008import applicationMain.DiscussionService;
009import applicationMain.GradingService;
010import applicationMain.Role;
011import entityClasses.Post;
012import entityClasses.PostList;
013import entityClasses.Reply;
014import entityClasses.ReplyList;
015import entityClasses.User;
016
017public class ModelGradebook {
018
019        private final PostList postList;
020        private final ReplyList replyList;
021        private final GradingService gradingService;
022
023        public ModelGradebook() {
024                DiscussionService discussionService = DiscussionService.getInstance();
025                postList = discussionService.getPostList();
026                replyList = discussionService.getReplyList();
027                gradingService = new GradingService(postList, replyList, Role.INSTRUCTOR);
028        }
029
030        public boolean canAccessGradebook(User user) {
031                if (user == null) {
032                        return false;
033                }
034                return user.getStaffRole() || user.getAdminRole();
035        }
036
037        public List<String> getStudentsWithReplies() {
038                List<String> students = new ArrayList<String>();
039                for (Reply reply : replyList.readAllReplies()) {
040                        String author = reply.getAuthorAsuUserId();
041                        if (author == null || author.trim().isEmpty()) {
042                                continue;
043                        }
044
045                        String cleanAuthor = author.trim();
046                        if (!students.contains(cleanAuthor)) {
047                                students.add(cleanAuthor);
048                        }
049                }
050                Collections.sort(students);
051                return students;
052        }
053
054        public String buildStudentReviewText(String studentUserName) {
055                if (studentUserName == null || studentUserName.trim().isEmpty()) {
056                        return "Select a student to review their gradebook details.";
057                }
058
059                String studentId = studentUserName.trim();
060                StringBuilder text = new StringBuilder();
061                text.append("Student: ").append(studentId).append("\n");
062
063                int uniqueCount;
064                boolean meetsRule;
065                try {
066                        uniqueCount = gradingService.countUniqueStudentsAnswered(studentId);
067                        meetsRule = gradingService.meetsThreeUniqueRequirement(studentId);
068                } catch (AccessDeniedException ex) {
069                        return "Access denied while reading gradebook data.";
070                }
071
072                text.append("Unique students answered: ").append(uniqueCount).append("\n");
073                if (meetsRule) {
074                        text.append("Status: COMPLETE (Rule of Three met)").append("\n\n");
075                } else {
076                        text.append("Status: INCOMPLETE (Needs replies to more unique students)").append("\n\n");
077                }
078
079                List<Reply> replies;
080                try {
081                        replies = gradingService.getAnswersForReview(studentId);
082                } catch (AccessDeniedException ex) {
083                        return "Access denied while reading replies for review.";
084                }
085
086                if (replies.isEmpty()) {
087                        text.append("No replies found for this student.");
088                        return text.toString();
089                }
090
091                text.append("Proof (what they said and to whom):\n");
092                int index = 1;
093                for (Reply reply : replies) {
094                        String target = reply.getOriginalPostAuthorAsuUserId();
095                        if (target == null || target.trim().isEmpty()) {
096                                Post post = postList.readPostById(reply.getPostId());
097                                if (post != null) {
098                                        target = post.getAuthorAsuUserId();
099                                }
100                        }
101
102                        if (target == null || target.trim().isEmpty()) {
103                                target = "Unknown";
104                        }
105
106                        text.append(index).append(". Replied to ").append(target.trim()).append("\n");
107                        text.append("   Message: ").append(reply.getBody()).append("\n\n");
108                        index++;
109                }
110
111                return text.toString();
112        }
113}
